checks.name: Application boots with 110 controls and consistent v1.8.2 identity
Four modules receive exactly 440 stable requirement records
Deterministic inheritance copies the fixed field set and records a canonical fingerprint
Parent changes mark inherited records stale without overwriting child snapshots
Local supplements remain separate from the inherited base snapshot
Governed override preserves local fields while retaining source fingerprint
Local override without rationale is rejected
Sibling product cannot become an inheritance source
v1.8.1 declarations migrate without invented source snapshots
Portfolio 1.2 JSON round trip preserves module requirement cardinality
